title: Redstone Extended
description: Extends the existing functions of redstone by giving the player more granular control and condensing large circuits into small ones.
body:
This mod aims to take existing vanilla functions of redstone and make them more powerful. This is accomplished in two ways: by giving the player more control, and by making large circuits smaller. There are multiple blocks planned to accomplish this, but currently the mod only supplies two: the clock circuit and the redstone delay. The clock circuit block is a single block that functions as a clock circuit with configurable on and off durations. The redstone delay delays the signal running through it by a configurable amount, maintaining the same strength. (Please not that the durations are given in redstone ticks, not game ticks.)
